hooks.name: block-protected-files
hooks.description: Prevent edits to sensitive files (.env, secrets, prod configs)
hooks.command: case "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" in *.env|*.env.*|*/.env|*/.env.*|*/secrets/*|*/credentials/*|*.prod.*|*prod.config.*) echo "BLOCKED: $CLAUDE_FILE_PATH is a protected file" >&2; exit 1;; esac
